text: Main thak kar baith nahi sakta, client ne contract cancel kar diya aur ghar mein naya baccha aur college fees ka bojh seedha mere sar par aa gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk ko warm line ke saath hold karke Lens B se duty-role mirror karna.
text: Is level ka load aaye toh saans bhaari hona bilkul samajh aata hai. Tum ruk nahi pa rahe kyunki tum khud ko ghar ka primary sahara maan kar chal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Haan, papa kisan the, unhone bas isi umeed mein padhaya tha ki main parivaar sambhalunga, isliye main thak kar baith nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk ke baad Lens D se lambi chalti thakan ka duration reflect karna.
text: Kaafi arse se tum bina actual break ke sirf survive mode mein chal rahe ho, jaise rukna allowed hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Bilkul, rona ya break lena luxury lagta hai, aur dimag bas yehi bolta hai ki main thak kar baith nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se implied fear ko softly pakadna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ghar ka aadmi toot nahi sakta

strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement, Lens B se role-lock mirror karna.

coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta

text: Jab subah woh thought trigger hota hai, us pal sabse heavy kya lagta hai - bacche ka kharcha, college fees, ya business bandh hone ka darr?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sabse pehle college fees ka pressure dimaag pe baith jata hai, phir bacche ka kharcha aur fir kaam dhoondhne ka panic.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se pressure ka repeating sequence mirror karna.
text: Har din ek fixed order mein bojh chadhta hai - pehle fees, phir baccha, phir business bachane ki daud.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bola, sach mein andar se battery khatam ho chuki hai, bas upar se chal raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based mapping ke hisab se hidden exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum sirf pareshaan nahi, poori tarah se exhausted ho - duty chal rahi hai par fuel almost khatam ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas machine ki tarah kaam kar raha hoon, feel karne ki himmat hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke Employment reality se jodna aur worth-outcome separation dena.
text: Jab contract loss, family ka bojh aur fees ek saath aate hain, aisi exhaustion bahut real hoti hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek business setback se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sunke thoda halka laga, par raat ko phir se wahi loop start ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se provider-silence normalize karna.
text: Family ke primary earners mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki ghar sambhalna farz maana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon taaki aaj raat dimaag kam bhaage aur kal kaam pe focus ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal ke baad duty-compatible 3 micro options dena.
text: Teen quick options: 5 minute paani aur slow breathing, 7 minute mein kal ka top 1 income task likho, ya fees ke thought ko ek fixed note mein park karo taaki loop repeat na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Top 1 income task wala point doable lag raha hai, warna main random tension mein ulajh jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step by step chalwana.
text: Pehle phone ya diary kholo, ek line likho: kal subah kis lead ko pehla message bhejna hai. Phir uske neeche next 10 minute ka action likho. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likhte hi clarity aa gayi, pehle sab ek saath dimaag mein ghoom raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 stress context ka structural reframe dekar self-blame kam karna.
text: Contract shock ke baad overload feel hona personal weakness nahi, livelihood pressure ka natural response hota hai - especially jab ghar ka major load ek hi insaan sambhale.

speaker: Seeker
text: Saans ab thodi theek lag rahi hai, energy low hai par panic utna nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro progress validate karke stability focus reinforce karna.
text: Low energy ke bawajood tumne structure banaya, yeh strong recovery step hai. Aaj perfect hona zaroori nahi, stable rehna kaafi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Subah phir farz mode on hoga, darr hai ki phir se scatter na ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning slip prevent karne ke liye 3 tiny anchors dena.
text: Subah ke liye teen anchors rakho: uthte hi paani, 2 minute slow exhale, aur seedha wahi top 1 message bhejna before kisi aur kaam mein jaana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahta hoon, ye sequence practical lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe: predictable routine se overload kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar din ke beech mein phir se load badh gaya toh koi raasta hai kya instant reset ka?

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker
text: Next 10 minute wala line useful laga, load manageable mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sleep wind-down ke liye 3 no-extra-burden options dena.
text: Sone se pehle bas teen cheezein: paani, 3 minute slow breathing, aur kal ka top 1 task screen par pin. Isse farz loop ki speed kam hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab situation sambhalne layak lag rahi hai, total collapse jaisa feel nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter

text: Andar se kuch feel hi nahi hota kabhi kabhi, par aadmi ko bas sambhalna hota hai, bolna nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement, Lens B se role-pressure hold karna.
text: Sambhalne ke role mein tum apni sunsaan thakan chhupa rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, bacha sote hue yaad aata hai, par dimag wahi bolta hai ki thak kar gir nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke words se core node isolate karne ke liye single grounded question puchna.
text: Jab yeh thought sabse loud hota hai, us second mein sabse heavy kya lagta hai - funding rukna, ghar ka kharcha, ya bache se doori?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sab mix hai, par ghar ka kharcha aur bache se door rehna dono ek saath chubhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se provider-duty aur bache se relational pain ko mirror karna.
text: Ek taraf tum poora ghar pakde hue ho, aur dusri taraf bache se doori ka dard bhi saath le kar chal rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, andar numb ho gaya hoon, jaise feel karne ka switch off ho gaya ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based mapping se numbness ke neeche exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai yeh numbness ke peeche gehri exhaustion jam gayi hai - kartavya chal raha hai par andar ka fuel bahut kam bacha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, ab sirf function mode hai, personal side almost bandh hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Numbness validate karke C4 funding-loss reality se jodna aur worth alag karna.
text: Funding rukna, bachche ki zimmedari aur ghar ka load saath aaye toh aisa numb feel karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Tumhari keemat kisi ek contract ya quarter se kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sunke thoda halka laga, par raat ko phir numbers aur tension aa jaati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se first-gen earner silence normalize karna.
text: First-gen earners mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki ghar sambhalna kartavya maana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon taaki aaj raat dimag halka rahe aur kal kaam toot na jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 duty-fit micro options dena.
text: Teen options: 5 minute paani + slow breathing, 7 minute mein kal ka top 1 funding-recovery task likho, ya ghar kharche ki tension ko ek note pe park karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Top 1 funding-recovery task doable lag raha hai, warna main idhar-udhar bhatakta rehta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen task ko simple step-by-step execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo, ek line likho: kal subah kis lead ko pehla message jayega. Phir uske neeche agle 10 minute ka exact step likho. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh likhte hi clarity aayi, pehle sab ek hi dhundh jaisa lag raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 funding shock ka structural reframe dekar self-blame kam karna.
text: Funding stoppage ke baad overload feel hona personal weakness nahi hota; livelihood system pe jab jhatka aata hai toh dimaag aise hi react karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pressure kam lag raha hai, body heavy hai par panic jaisa rush nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro progress ko validate karna aur realistic stability target dena.
text: Heavy body ke bawajood tumne structure pakda, yeh strong practical shift hai. Aaj ka goal sirf stable rehna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah phir slip ka darr hai, start mein hi dimag toot jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Morning slip avoid karne ke liye 3 tiny anchors dena.
text: Subah ke liye teen anchors: uthte hi paani, 2 minute deep exhale, aur seedha top 1 outreach bhejna before baaki inbox.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahta hoon, yeh routine manageable lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Doosra structural reframe: fixed micro-steps se overload loop dheere padta hai.
text: Duty-heavy phase mein fixed chhote steps dimaag ko agla safe point dete hain, isliye panic-loop ki speed kam hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab dimag thoda settle lag raha hai, pehle jaisa freeze nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stabilization acknowledge karke continuity reinforce karna.
text: Ab tum freeze mode se actionable rhythm tak aa gaye ho. Isi pattern ko kal repeat karna enough hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Beech din agar phir numb ho gaya toh koi raasta hai kya instant reset ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment 3 under-2-min reset dena.
text: Instant reset pack: 6 slow exhales, top 1 note ko dobara padhna, aur khud se bolna - abhi sirf next 10 minute sambhalne hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Next 10 minute wali line kaam aa rahi hai, load manageable lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected coping line reinforce karke agency ko anchor karna.
text: Yehi practical tareeka hai - poora future nahi, next 10 minute hold karna. Tum recovery ko workable bana rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ka darr kam hua, aaj shayad neend thodi better aa jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sleep wind-down ke liye 3 no-extra-burden steps dena.
text: Sone se pehle teen cheezein: paani, 3 minute slow breathing, aur kal ka top 1 step screen pe pin. Isse raat ka load-loop dheere padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, ab cheezein sambhalne layak lag rahi hain, total breakdown jaisa feel nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close mein duty-pressure se structured control shift reinforce karna.
text: Aaj tum andhe pressure se structured control tak aa gaye ho, yeh strong shift hai. Funding ruki thi, par tumhari capacity abhi bhi khadi hai - kal ke anchors ready hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri reality hai
text: Structural endurance hi meri reality hai, business loss ke baad bache ki fees aur loan ki kist ne saans rok di hai par rukna option hi nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk ko warm line ke saath Lens B se family-head duty frame mirror karna.
text: Aise pressure mein bhaari lagna bilkul normal hai. Tum khud ko family head samajh ke chal rahe ho, isliye rukna tumhe namumkin lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri reality hai
text: Gaon mein kisan bhai aur sasural dono ko lagta hai shehar mein sab easy hai, par structural endurance hi meri reality hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lagatar month-end remittance pressure ka duration mirror karna.
text: Kaafi waqt se tum month-end hisaab aur remittance ke beech bina break ke chal rahe ho, jaise chain ka time hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach bolun toh naak katne ka darr rehta hai, isliye main himmat tootne bhi nahi deta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se social-image collapse ka implied fear softly mirror karna.
text: Tumhare andar yeh bhi chal raha hai ki agar tumne sach dikhaya toh parivaar ki image aur bharosa dono hilsakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi lagta hai family head ro nahi sakta, bas loan kist aur fees sambhalni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement, Lens B se role-pressure hold karna.
text: Head wale role mein tum apni toot ko dabaa rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri reality hai
text: Haan, bache ki muskurahat yaad aati hai par dimag turant remittance pe chala jata hai, structural endurance hi meri reality hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ke words se ek focused question puchkar core pressure node nikalna.
text: Jab raat ko loop chalta hai, sabse pehle kaunsa thought sabse zyada chipakta hai - fees, loan kist, ya naak katne ka darr?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle loan kist aur fees ka hisaab aata hai, phir lagta hai agar miss hua toh sab toot jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se financial duty aur social expectation ke double pull ko mirror karna.
